personal_note: First ride of the season. Legs felt heavy but the sun was out.
Easy spin along the river. Stopped for coffee at the bridge.
Long loop through the hills. Found a new climb on the south side.
Gravel paths were still muddy from last week's rain.
Group ride with two friends. Pushed hard on the final stretch.
First proper century attempt cut short by headwind. Next time.
Commute route but took the long way home through the park.
Solo ride at dawn. Empty roads and perfect temperature.
Mixed surface loop — tarmac to gravel to dirt track and back.
Big day in the mountains. Two major climbs and a fast descent.
Recovery spin after yesterday's hike. Just moving the legs.
Explored the east valley. Rolling hills with no traffic at all.
Windy but warm. Worked on holding pace into the gusts.
Evening ride. Golden hour through the wheat fields.
Longest ride this year. Felt strong until km 75 then survived.
Quick loop before the rain hit. Made it home just in time.
Summer solstice ride. Still light at 9pm.
Intervals on the flat section. Four sets of 5 minutes hard.
Dawn start to beat the heat. Back before noon.
Short and easy. Too hot for anything serious.
Night ride experiment. Headlamp on the climb was surreal.
Gravel loop with loaded bags. Testing the bikepacking setup.
Weekend epic. Three passes and a lake stop in the middle.
Lazy afternoon pedal. No plan just rode where it felt right.
maintenance_note: Rear tire replaced — old one was worn through

personal_note: Tempo ride on the ring road. Consistent effort all the way.
Revisited the south climb. Faster than March by two minutes.
Last summer evening ride. Crickets and cool air.
Autumn colors starting. The descent through the forest was perfect.
Wet roads but no rain. Careful on the corners.
maintenance_note: New brake pads front and rear

personal_note: Short recovery ride. Legs still tired from the weekend.
Last big ride before it gets dark early. Made it count.
Foggy morning ride. Couldn't see 50 meters ahead on the climb.
Leaf-covered gravel paths. Beautiful but slippery.
Cold hands for the first time. Need to find the winter gloves.
Last ride above 50km until spring probably. Savored every km.
maintenance_note: Full bike service — cables and housing replaced
